title: Create x End Remastered Recipes
description: Adds heated mixing recipes for most of the eyes from End Remastered
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/583d0025c950d5cba07f58a88eb4559359d37a83.png)

Eyes of Ender are too easy to get? -> Use End Remastered
But you don't want to travel to every structure & use the Create Mod? -> Combine with this datapack

- Adds heated mixing recipes for most of the eyes from End Remastered. 

Create Remastered Recipes uses json files to add recipes for the different eyes of the End Remastered Mod. This WON'T stop the eyes from spawning in structures!

- **Requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric), [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem)**

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/W7W51CDJU1)
